summary: Workflow Master Setup (Super Admin) feature tested end-to-end: backend pytest (12/12 passed) + frontend Playwright UI flow. Save with password, reorder (▼) + toggle OFF, /me reflects new order for CRE & Planning, wrong-password 401, unknown-role 404, RBAC 403 for non-super admin all verified. CRE Board renders tabs in the saved order with disabled menus hidden. Project Management Module tab still works (regression OK). Configs restored to seeded order.
action_items: Optional: CREBoard.ALL_TAB_DEFS does not yet map keys 'all_projects' and 'income' from the backend Workflow Master catalog, so those two menus are silently dropped from the rendered tab list (only 5 of 7 enabled menus shown). Either remove them from WORKFLOW_ROLE_CATALOG['cre'] or add ALL_TAB_DEFS entries so Super Admin toggles for them have visible effect.
critical_code_review_comments: projects.py is ~9760 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Split feature modules (e.g., workflow_master, payments, cre, planning) into their own routers.
Workflow Master save endpoint correctly verifies super-admin password via auth.verify_password and uses cookie session — no token leak. Good.
Mongo _id correctly excluded via projection ({_id:0}) in _merged_role_config — good.
CREBoard relies on ALL_TAB_DEFS keyed lookup; any menu key the catalog ships that lacks a UI mapping is dropped silently. Recommend logging a console.warn so future regressions are visible.
_merged_role_config tolerates partial saved menus by appending unseen seeded keys at the end with enabled=true — robust against schema additions. Good.
Frontend WorkflowMasterPanel uses native HTML5 drag-drop without a touch fallback — fine for desktop Super Admin use case.
test_credentials: Super Admin admin@constructionos.com / Demo@1234, CRE cre@constructionos.com / Demo@1234, Planning planning@constructionos.com / Demo@1234 — all working in preview env.
seed_data_creation: None. Test ZZ-step restored CRE and Planning to seeded order with all menus enabled.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workflow Master endpoints live in /app/backend/routes/projects.py lines 9554-9760. Catalog has 12 roles. /admin/workflow-master/me uses cookie session; super_admin role itself returns {menus:[]} (super_admin not in catalog). Frontend panel: WorkflowMasterPanel.jsx, mounted from Settings.jsx tab value='workflow-master'. CRE Board reads via axios GET /api/admin/workflow-master/me and maps keys through ALL_TAB_DEFS (CREBoard.jsx around line 870-933). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_workflow_master.py.
